rule.statement: Every stakeholder where current_engagement != desired_engagement MUST have a written strategy section.
rule.rationale: Without explicit strategy, level deltas drift without action.

rule.statement: Each strategy MUST have at least two measurable indicators with baseline, target, and evidence source.
rule.rationale: Unmeasurable indicators produce theatre, not movement.

rule.statement: Each weekly cycle MUST record the current-vs-desired delta per stakeholder; absence of recorded delta flags the entry as untracked.
rule.rationale: Cycles without delta tracking lose feedback loop.

rule.statement: A diff between prior and current register MUST be produced weekly; absent diff blocks weekly status publication.
rule.rationale: Silent movement (especially regression) is the leading missed signal.

rule.statement: Any stakeholder regressing >= 1 level MUST be escalated to the sponsor in the next status; silent regression is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Regression is leading indicator of project distress.
